reviews.review_text:
Spent a week in this lovely park, literally on the mouth of the river.
We booked a premium powered site on banks of the inlet.
Each site is spacious, grassy and separated by mature, shady trees.
The amenities are very modern and spotlessly clean.
The bird life is abundant- rosellas, ring necks, fairy wrens, ducks, seagulls, magpies, pelicans, swans and seagulls.
Loved it.
Easy walking distance into town along the river, for a beer and a counter meal at the pub.
The park has its own cafe as well.
Very enjoyable experience.
Caravan sites are good size with pad and amenities are clean and in good condition.

A paddler|The staff are rude, the owner of the caravan park is very rude and aggressive.|I plan my trip with the paddlers club a year ahead. Booked and pay half of the fee on January.|When I came in March 2026 I have been given bay to park. The bay was small and half of it was overgrown by bushes hanging as low as 1m above the ground right in the middle of bay. I went to office and ask for giving me other bay and been told by staff - I can have a refund and go to other caravan park. I had no choice but to have this bay. I had to cut the branches to open the door of my small but tall caravan. I could not have my awnings out because of the bushes blocking completely the space, the night rains wet all my belongings, could not eat or seat outside of van because the rubbish from the overgrowing bushes was everywhere. I went to office and said "I can see you don't care and I will report you". In the afternoon the owner came screaming on me, calling me names and using f.. words, demanding my key to show me better way of parking. The brunches already were scratching my solar panels on the roof - his rage took about 10 minutes. He was yelling - "you are banned from this caravan park for good". |The signage at this caravan park is invisible and inconsistent. My bay and few bays next door had no gray water outlet, so the water from the other caravans was on my bay.

Central to everything you need to do in Denmark,  paid for a Riverview powered site and couldn't see anything past the trees on the waterline, internet/wifi was none existence and had to hotspot the whole time we were there. Site had trees over hanging which limited usable space. Facilities were clean and tidy everyday,  but only 1 soap dispenser between 6 sink, no paper towel only 1 hand dryer which was not up to standards. Staff pleasant on arrival.

Nice spot,close to town,staff are very nice an kind,amenities are kept clean,lovely little Cafe at entrance to caravan park..the grounds need a bit of TLC from the owners an the caravans parked up on the river side have there grey water hose laid on the ground so if walking on pathway you see what was washed down there drain..yuk...
Great place to camp Great amenities, very clean and comfortable 👌
Grounds need a lot of maintenance. Bays are bear dirt and dusty. Showers need more hooks and a bench along the wall. A beautiful setting with great river views and access.
Camp-site was good, easy access to facilites
Excellent spot

All I can say is WOW! What a beautiful place to stay. We came down here for a cattle sale and desperate to find a last minute spot to stay in and the lovely ladies gave us a house to stay in. The unit was clean, spacious, great for kids! I love how close we are to the ocean, playground and there are so many activities for the kids. Big kitchen, comfy beds, such a homely feeling when we stay. My son absolutely loved his stay. We will 100% be coming back and recommending this to others. Thankyou so much!

The location is great but the extra for rive front sites are obstructed by bush/ trees. The young girls in the office were so lovely couldn't do more for you. The old guy could take some training from them, instead of starting the nteraction with swearing and being so rude Really put a downer on our stay really disheartened. won't be back.
Awesome camp sites

This caravan park is beautiful and right at the Rivermouth 😁.
The shower block is clean with good pressure.
The staff are lovely.
1 star down due to site price. $55 whether or not you want a powered site. Also, the prices at the cafe/restaurant are a bit extreme.
Great place to visit
The staff were very polite and helpful. Beautiful campsite with good facilities as compared to other campsites I had been to
A bit shabby, you walk dirt from outside onto the caravan, especially when raining. Trees dirty your car, grounds a not exactly freshly mowed, nothing noteworthy

Wir waren schon auf mehreren Campingplätzen und was Preis-Leistung angeht war dieser hier nicht gut.

Die Toiletten und Duschen waren wohl modernisiert worden jedoch ließ die Sauberkeit zu wünschen übrig. Überall Insekten und Dreck.
Außerdem roch es überall nach Entenkacke.

Gut ist dass der Stellplatz eine betonierte Fläche hat und auch das Personal war nett.
Quaint caravan park.  Right on waters edge.  Close to town.  Pleasant staff and the amenties are good.  What more can you ask for.
Magic location and well run family caravan park!  Thanks to Alicia and the fantastic staff that run this beautiful park.  We will be back.
Everything so good so far. Wifi water are good , good area  good location  and good staff. Many things to see in Denmark.
Beautiful location friendly helpful staff,  clean amenities.

What an amazing spot… the owners are friendly and it’s a family run business..
just a park to relax and unwind at with so many adventure to be had..

Fishing, boating, cafe eating ( top rated food)

We were stuck in a jam and they have done all they could to make our stay welcome while we are in limbo with car trouble..

thanks so much Rose and Noel..

You are all top notch and a place we will not forget and we look forward to coming back!

I rate this place from the activity they have to the family spirit that’s here…

Michael &Bek

Camped by the river - paid for river view site but unfortunately most of these sites are overgrown
Park itself was tidy with nice ammenities
Just disappointing re: river
A tranquil beauty spot, we enjoyed river views calm waters and not so many people in the area I look forward to returning
Great park , clean facilities,  ground a bit soggy and tight parking. Beware the bollards.
Quiet, quaint place. Plenty of room. Pet friendly. Clean amenities. Reasonable price.
Excellent location ,wonderful place
Great location helpful staff very relaxing & quiet right by the river a lovely 1.4 km walk into town
Great position by the river. Close enough to town centre. The studio is clean and comfortable. Friendly staff.

As it is named right on the river with clean functional rooms and beautiful views. In our case, we stayed because of a vehicle calamity, and the friendly support and assistance we received was greatly appreciated. Every cloud has a silver lining, and this park and the people there was every bit of that for us.

I rarely, if ever, give reviews. But this park floored me with their attitude. I agree with other reviewers. The lady who answered my phone call on 23/07/2025 was the rudest, shortest and unfriendliest person we have encountered in our entire 3 month holiday to WA. Everything was too much trouble for her! No thanks!!! So we rang Big4 and the contrast could not have been greater when such a friendly, helpful, cheerful person answered our call and took our booking. Why do inhospitable people work in hospitality haha!

We camp/fish in Denmark monthly and generally stay at the Big4 with no issues. Thought we might try Rivermouth however the lady we spoke to when booking was so rude and abrupt it has completely put us off from staying at this accommodation.
Jarring
This caravan park is in one of the nicest locations i have seen, by the river

Hubby n I had a very relaxing stay. Amazing views of the inlet. Great, friendly staff. Accommodated our every request. We camped in our trailer which withstood a downpour 👌👌. Our site was very close to the amenities which were very clean on a daily basis. Nice hot showers! Ended up staying another 4 nights. Thanks 🫶
$43 per night , no power , off season ??  Yeah righto ... went to big4 ocean beach 👍👍👍👍👍
Nice place to camp for a few nights. Large convenience and clean. Good fishing within walking distance and a brilliant cafe at the front of the park.

Great location to enjoy denmark. Beautiful View towards the lake, great bathrooms, very good water preassure, hot instant water. Great very well equiped kitchen. Spaces aré big enouhj, even pet friendly
Beautiful place to unwind and reset
This boat ramp/ caravan park is a great spot to sit & have morning tea lime we did & a quick visit of the feathered variety 😀

Great spot for a caravan park, we got six powered sites for our group as a base to explore Denmark and surrounding areas. Nice facilities kept clean, hot showers, coin-operated laundry, well appointed camp kitchen, boat ramp. Not much in the way of playground equipment (some old swings) but the kids enjoyed themselves regardless.
It was a busy Easter weekend so it got a bit packed at the end with a few noisy neighbours. There was some confusion with our booking and they accidentally booked another guest on one of our sites. That issue got sorted out quickly by the staff.
The onsite cafe offers excellent food at commensurate prices but is only open until 2pm.
Overall a memorable stay and would recommend.
Lovely location. Muddy when it rains
Stayed in 2 bedroom chalet. Very nice owners very friendly people and accomodation very nice. Great place to stay comfortable and great location to town. Thank you for a great stay.
Good position, and intentions are good but caravan park amenities needs more maintenance applied.
Awesome
Lovely caravan park right near the river, nice amenities and a great cafe. Wrapped in trees so you get a lovely nature vibe.
Great spot, sites are a little small and tight to get in to. Toilets and showers are very good. Nice and quiet but still close to town. CP staff only too willing to help out.

A great caravan park, central to all the beautiful spots in the region. The ablutions were dated, not cleaned every day, and the showers cramped. The camp also being dependent on the Shire of Denmark for cleaning bins once a week only, we arrived at our site with the bin already overflowing, and it stayed that way for the 4 days we resided at the camp. Unfortunately, not an ideal situation.

Beautiful place- Karen at front desk was lovely .
Nice views amenities are ok little muddy at times .
Looking forward to our stay .

Firstly the location is fabulous as we have always stayed here in the past and had no problems.|Seems this visit will be the last, as long as the current operators are running the show.|The property lacks maintenance and the staff are rude.|Don’t tell people sites are booked when in fact they are not we are not, observed a site vacant during our stay but apparently it wasn’t available.

Was very disappointed with the nasty attitude of the owners wife. She was rude to another couple we were meeting there for a four day break and then rude to me when I talked with her the next day. The park is extremely run down now, which is a real shame because it was a terrific place. I checked out another caravan park while I was there and was told that they receive many negative comments about the Rivermouth. I won’t be back.

This is one of our favourite parks, and our annual holiday at Rivermouth is a highlight on our calendar. Unlike the big corporate run parks, this one remains under the ownership and sight of one family, and it shows. The whole family are involved and are hands on in the day to day operation of the park. If you have a problem with anything, tell them and it gets fixed. The sites are a good size, and the location is fantastic. The addition in recent years of a cafe on site is wonderful - the coffee is very good and the fish and chips are excellent. While we stay in our caravan, we have also had family stay in the chalets and believe them to be very good value for money. Would definitely recommend a stay at this one.
Best place to stay relax and enjoy the Southwest and the family and the kid's do a wonderful job 😀 recommend to the entire world 🌎.

A Hidden Gem on the Denmark River – Perfect for Families and Nature Lovers!

Our recent stay at Denmark River Caravan Park was nothing short of magical! Nestled along the picturesque Denmark River, this park is the perfect destination for a relaxing, family-friendly getaway. From the moment we arrived, we were welcomed by the warm hospitality of the staff and the serene, natural surroundings.

One of the best things about this park is the range of accommodation options. Whether you’re bringing your caravan, pitching a tent, or opting for a cozy cabin, there’s something for everyone. The park is beautifully maintained, with spacious sites and well-kept amenities that make for a comfortable stay.

Nature lovers will absolutely adore the abundant wildlife that calls this place home. We spent our mornings watching the pelicans gather near the fish cleaning station, a mesmerizing sight that delighted both kids and adults alike. The little ones had a fantastic time feeding the friendly ducks, adding to the charming, family-oriented atmosphere. If you're into water activities, the boat launch makes it easy to set off for a peaceful paddle or fishing adventure on the river.

One of the highlights of our stay was visiting Reminiscence Café, a true hidden treasure within the park. With a fresh, cook-to-order menu for both breakfast and lunch, the food was absolutely delicious! There’s nothing better than starting the day with a hearty meal and a cup of coffee while soaking in the tranquil river views.

The combination of breathtaking natural beauty, fantastic amenities, and a welcoming, family-friendly environment makes Denmark River Caravan Park an absolute must-visit. Whether you’re looking to unwind, explore the outdoors, or create unforgettable memories with your loved ones, this place has it all. We’ll definitely be back!
Lovely spot on the river mouth ,dog friendly, easy to walk into Denmark.

We stayed for 2 days on a powered site, the location to town was great 👍 within walking and riding distance.
The parks amenities are below average, the showers backing up with water, and generally unclean. The park was full so you would expect the bathrooms to be clean. They are not cleaned to a commercial standard, at all.
Nice spot on the river but probably won't be back.

the camp sites are very cramped, a van with an annex will practically touch the next van with an annex.  great location and toilets are clean.  only powered sites available and 4 times the price I have been paying elsewhere for uncovered sites

Wonderful Experience at Denmark Rivermouth Caravan Park

Our stay at Denmark Rivermouth Caravan Park was absolutely amazing! We stayed in a two-bedroom chalet right by the river, which was super clean and well-equipped. We were travelling with a baby, and the chalet was perfect for our needs: it had a ramp for easy access and plenty of space for a portable cot and pram.

The staff were incredibly friendly and helpful throughout our stay. The café on-site served delicious food, which was a lovely bonus!

The location is fantastic, very close to the town centre. We enjoyed several walks, and the experience was magical, especially for the kids, as the trail featured hidden fairy houses. My children loved searching for them!

I highly recommend this park for anyone looking for a welcoming, clean, and conveniently located spot in Denmark. We can’t wait to come back!
Beautiful campground with everything you need and only a 5-10 min drive away from the CBD. It was very full though!

Rivermouth Caravan Park offers a fantastic location with beautiful views and easy access to the river and nearby beaches, making it an ideal spot for nature lovers. The sites are spacious and well-maintained, and the peaceful atmosphere is a major highlight.

However, the amenities could use some attention. The toilets and showers are quite dated and showing significant signs of wear, which detracts from the overall experience.

Additionally, the no-sharing policy for campsites and amenities and playground and also the Cafe may feel restrictive for some, especially families or groups traveling together.  Strict enforcement in all corners

Despite these drawbacks, the stunning surroundings and friendly vibe make it a worthwhile place to stay. A bit of investment in upgrading the facilities would easily push this park to a 5-star rating.

Tv reception non existent water pressure absolute crap amenities kept very clean thanks cleaning team the rest is 1 out of 5star will certainly not recommend lift your game guys as this is a popular tourist spot put people before profit
Lovely clean camping site but the staff needs training... can come across rude.

What a beautiful little spot. The service was amazing. We arrived Boxing Day evening after being on the road all day and had nowhere to stay. We pulled in here with no one in the office but contacted the number left there. They told us to pull up where we could find a spot and sort payment the following day. What a beautiful family, with beautiful service in a stunning spot. We will definitely be back.

This park needs a lot of maintenance. I would not use the toilet block under the tall trees near the road, the womens side smelled of sewage. We timed the cleaners, 18 minitues to clean both mens & womens, laundry & disabled bathroom. My husband went into the ablutions in the centre of the park, he said the mould was half way up the walls. The sprinklers did not get put on the lawns for the 6 days that we stayed, lawns are mostly dead.
Rude staff!!!!

Camped here and loved being right on the river, under gorgeous trees, so close to town and scores of walk and bike tracks. The check-in was cheery, the facilities were super clean and the camp kitchen had plenty of tables and chairs for everyone. Nice cafe with good food, coffee and ice creams. Popped the kayak in and followed the river down and then out again, then did their river cruise which was great value and entertaining. Highly recommend, thanks for the refreshing stay.
Overpriced powered sites.

Would have rated this stay 5/5, up until I was treated extremely rudely by one of the staff members in the Reminisce cafe on the campsite. ||||The water was cut off due to breakage of a water tap and no coffee, showers, toilet or any water facilities were available on 24th December 2024 morning. During this time, I requested a coffee from the cafe, I was told it wasn’t possible because of this water outage. I was told by one of the staff members to purchase my coffee elsewhere. This was no issue and I drove to and purchased my coffees in Denmark town. On arrival back to the camp site I stopped back in the campsite cafe to take one sweetener for my coffee.||||A red haired woman with black framed glasses named Alicia rolled her eyes at me, said I couldn’t take the sweeteners even though I had explained the situation to her. She was extremely rude, muttered nasty comments under her voice and was extremely unprofessional. I spoke very politely to this staff member and was met with a condescending and rude response. Regardless of the issue with the water I feel this was a very reasonable request given that we were paying customers on the site.||||||Imagine not giving one sweetener on Christmas Eve…
One of the best ever perfect in many ways.

The caravan sites are lawned, some with concrete slabs. Mature trees for shade and great amenities. Very clean and a great cafe. We went on a river cruise which included a glass of wine and fish and chips on return all for a very reasonable price. A great family run park!

We absolutely love Denmark and have been staying at your park now for our one or two week holidays every year for some 7 odd years now. Facilities are great and always clean, staff are always friendly and welcoming and Noel is a legend. Keep up the good work. The food is great and the coffee is to die for.
Really nice camp site with good facilities!
Very friendly reception.  Very welcoming.  Nice spot along the river and inlet/lake area.  Quiet, grassy green sites.  I would definitely stay again.

Very well situated near the river away from busy roads and yet only a 15 minute walk along the river to the town centre. Amenities are sufficient and clean. One constructive feedback to the manager would be to place firmer toilet paper on, it doesn't come of the roll easily and you need a lot of you want to keep your fingers clean.
Could do with a bit of upgrading.

We had a great stay here! Exceptional service! Great facilities, very clean and tidy! Cafe was great too! Central to everywhere we wanted to go explore! Bathrooms and kitchen modern and well kept! Can’t wait to go back next trip to enjoy again
Nice caravan park with good spots for a view of the lake. Bring some old shoes as the whole park is full of ducks.

Lovely spot and great for kayaking. Unfortunately I spoke to someone who said we could come at anytime only to get ready and then get a call saying we could only be there at 2. The cabin available had two bunks and a queen bed. We then brought another child but were told we could only have a villa. This cost another $300. Even after I explained one child always slept in the same bed as parent, we still couldn't have the other. The villas also have no oven which meant we had to plan dinners. For $365 a night, there should be an oven . Will go to Big 4 next time.

Love it here the location is perfect 20min walk into town. Manager's are great people staff are always happy & friendly 😊 so much to do here in the park aswell but most of all the Caffa and the food is something to come down for .

Tidy and well maintained park.  Friendly staff. Ablutions very good and modern campers kitchen.  Good walking paths into Denmark.  Nice to be close to the river.  Lots of bird life - pelicans, parrots, ducks and ducklings, etc.  Watch out for the greedy seagulls.
Wunderschöne Anlage

We have been here several times & have been very happy in the past but disappointed this visit. We were given a damp spot right slap bang next to another caravan in the near empty area. We could have asked for another site but assumed there must be many more vans expected. Please space people apart for privacy. Also a very dilapidated "on site" van nearly opposite was a major eyesore. Not worth $47/night. We have been travelling for 2 months & it's the highest price we have paid.

The owners should gp have a shower in the showers they provide! No shower curtain, just one hook and a shelf that gets soaking wet. Owners take a change of clothes, try and hang your clean clothes and your clothes that you are currently wearing all.on one hook impossible! Try and get dressed afterwards in the wet. Seriously, it's not rocket science, you need 3 or 4 hooks and a shower curtain. WAke up!

A wonderful caravan Park in the most Idyllic location... Even worth visiting the cafe for coffee and lunch if you already have accommodation... Noel and Rosie are great hosts with a wicked sense of humour.. I really enjoyed my time staying and since moving to Denmark I still visit regularly for morning coffee by the water.. :)   I highly recommend!!
Nice park. Not many people as off season so this suited us. When the park is quiet I don’t understand why reception staff place people on top of each other. Give them some space.
A beautiful park at a beautiful spot.
Caravan site was fine. Ablutions were clean, though I never understand why parks don't clean ablutions between 10 and 2.
really cool spot, facilities were clean and plentiful

Camping au top,
Sanitaire propre, eau chaude !
Personnel agréable et chaleureux
Cuisine d extérieur très sympathique
Wifi gratuite
Great facilities. Shame some guests leave kitchen & bbq's a mess. Staff do a good job cleaning up .. thanks
Nice place with clean amenities although don’t offer unpowered sites. Therefore you’re charged for power you don’t use.

I have seen so many negative reviews about the Rivermouth Caravan Park that I had initially tried to get my husband to change our reservation to another Park.  So glad we didn’t - we had paid a deposit so figured we should just try it for ourselves.  The Reception Staff were very pleasant, welcoming and informative; the sites are big and easy to access - even with a 24ft Van.  We’ve now had a couple of days here and have discovered that even if the Toilets are cleaned early - I’m not aware of when they are cleaned - we have not been inconvenienced at all.  I don’t believe there is anything we could complain about regarding maintenance - although I guess we’re not here during a downpour of rain.  That can cause inconvenience at any time anywhere.  Overall we definitely would recommend Rivermouth Caravan Park Denmark WA.
We came here second time and we love it. Good location, friendly staff.  Very busy. Very nice town with lovely people. 😍

Rooms are wonderfull, clean and tidy. Staff is friendly and helpfull. Location is fantastic, scenery great. If you're staying here you won't be disappointed. Do yourself a favour and book a cruise on the river, great value for money, includes wine and dinner from the on-site Cafe. Can't fault it!

We stayed on a powered site for 3 nights it was near the camp kitchen at the back of the park and was fantastic the kitchen was new and we made the most of it, boat ramp right there and we fished off the beach and had a great time.

I was very disappointed with our site. Booked premium waterfront, it was far from premium, got a glimpse of the water through the trees. Lovely views of the toilet block, though (sarcasm). The site wasn't maintained very well. Large overhanging tree, which made it difficult placing our van onto the site.

We just spend 4 nights at the Rivermouth Caravan Park with our two dogs. There is no access to the water for the water loving pups.
The park is crowded and the sites are not very nice, hardly any grass.
The location is nice, closed to town and perfect if you had a boat. Unfortunately it is very smelly as well and we did not enjoy our stay at all.
Absolutely awesome will definitely be back if they have us lol

EDIT; you only have to read the business’s replies to their negative reviews to see they absolutely do not care how they come across to the customer and aren’t interested in receiving feedback. Their replies are just as dismissive as their customer service. My negative review was NOT about the power outage it was about the rude and nasty behaviour of the women at reception. The only suitable response is a genuine apology. This is clearly an ongoing issue based on the reviews and further proves that these operators know they’ll be busy due to location therefore don’t care about basic politeness. When you ask a question (will I still be charged the full price if I can’t access power) and are immediately told to leave instead of being given an answer to your question, this is disgusting behaviour. Her words literally ‘oh well you can just go somewhere else’ and started snatching up the paperwork. She was also disgusting to me on the phone whilst booking. I regret giving this business my money even more after the ridiculous response below. I did not have a choice about going elsewhere-  if I did have a choice I would NEVER have paid to be treated so rudely.

This spot obviously relies on its location, as the reception staff were the most unnecessarily rude I have ever encountered. Unhelpful and nasty both when booking over the phone and when checking in. The power was out and I dared to politely ask a question about what would happen if I couldn’t charge the van, and the woman told me to go somewhere else. If I had the option to I definitely would have. I could only stay for 4 hours, paid for a full day and night and was then treated so rudely. I wouldn’t support this business after this experience. I highly recommend the staff at the Walpole rest stop instead, and this was an equally beautiful location with bigger nicer sites. We also had a very positive experience at Peaceful Bay caravan park and the sites are lovely and shaded.
Great location but pretty "squeezy" at the moment
Great location, but most sites very tight to access and depart! Designed for 14 foot single axles on the back of a Morris Minor.

Stayed 2 nights in studio cabin no 6.
Cabins are clean and spacious looking over inlet would definitely stay again with 2 exceptions. Not cabins 5 or 6 you have to park under a huge rubber tree which did some damage to our car !! Also the café do not allow shared meals which I have never heard off before anywhere, most good restaurants encourage sharing. When we saw that we did not even go in. Cheers Bill
We camped, nice shady spot beautiful outlook. Clean facilities, great camp kitchen. Activities and Cafe on-site, short walk to town and so many beautiful beaches to visit.
An unpowered campsite with one small tent & two people costs a whopping $70 for a night.

Poor quality kayaks and grumpy service. Hired kayaks from Denmark Rivermouth Caravan Park.  Kayaks were very basic and cheap. And pretty uncomfortable. Service was grumpy and unfriendly. Staff couldn’t even agree amongst themselves how many single kayaks they had  available for hire.
Great location! Our camping spot was clean and well sized. The staff are always happy to help eith any problems. Highly recommend staying here and we will be back!

Our second trip and this time with the caravan. We had a great four day stay, it's such a great location right on the river and Estuary. Short walk to town. Don't miss the fairies that live along the river. Great for the kids. Staff very friendly and will be back again.

Didnt stay
Went for look
Stunning

Wonderful place to stay. We stayed in a cabin, very impressed. Clean and new, well set up, lovely hot water, comfortable beds. Very friendly and helpful lady's at the reception. Very reasonable prices too. The only problem was the time went too quick!

Absolutely lovely caravan park. Great layout of spots and nice clean comfy grass with minimal prickles. The ablutions blocks are beautifully clean and totally well looked after. Loved every moment of my stay here. Thanks Shirley for being so accommodating!

Weather wasn't great this time round but still a lovely place to visit.
Lack of takeaway stores open Monday-Wednesday was a little disappointing, not even the pub was open.
Would suggest maybe a roster of takeaway shops open these days so at least obe is open so you can buy on those nights.
IGA being only place open was super busy.
Nice park, the weather let us down,  but we made the most of it, amenities were clean, plenty of bird life.
Nice

Exceptional place.
Superb position.
Ultra friendly owners.
A lovely setting. Friendly staff.
The best place I've ever stayed at great service clean areas good people will be going back there
Nice spot for a night's rest
very nice park
Friendly staff.  Booked 2 stayed 3. Vert clean and well maintained.

I love this place I go there every yea with family friends and we all love it so much the service is great and the bakery is one of our favs but jumping off the bridge into the river is by far the best and we like to call it troll bridge.
Great location. We stayed in a very nice studio apartment with river views. Friendly reception, great onsite cafe. No complaints.  We would stay here again.

One of the best van parks I've been to in a long time. Very well maintained. Very clean and tidy, amazing campers kitchen. And only $45 p/night for a van,  great location, walking trails along the river and into town.
Good all around and very easy.
Great location by the river 👌
Great location and amenities

Grew up in Denmark. So to take my son there some 20yts after moving away I could take him and my gorgeous wife Margot 💞 too. To.enjoy the trees river and surf love 💕 guys
Peaces and safe travels y'all
Swifty McGee

Great stay,
Bathrooms were really nice, the location was perfect for us. Rose at reception was really lovely, she got us in last minute after hours which we appreciated and also directed us on what tourist sites to check out in the area.
Definitely recommend!
Really great spot to stop and refuel.  Good kitchen, good laundry & showers, nice & hot.
